data.title: Document and integrate all binaries/scripts into CLAUDE.md
data.description:
## Goal

Inventory all binary/script/executables in the environment and make them discoverable via [CLAUDE.md](<http://CLAUDE.md>).

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] All binaries/scripts/executables documented in [CLAUDE.md](<http://CLAUDE.md>)
- [ ] GSD milestone created for implementing each executable

## Context

Currently `bin/healthcheck` is the only documented script. The environment likely has more executables that should be discoverable via the routing system.
